user.title: Configure NIBE Integration

data_description.nibe_entity: The writable number entity for the heating curve offset (register 47011 on F-series, e.g. number.heat_offset_s1_47011, or a MyUplink number ending in heating_offset_climate_system_1)

gespot.title: Configure Spot Price Integration

model.title: Heat Pump Model
model.description: Select your heat pump model. The model sets safe degree-minute thresholds, COP curves, and flow temperature limits.

optional.title: Optional Features
optional.description: Configure optional features. Found {weather_count} weather entities.

optional_sensors.title: Sensors

data_description.degree_minutes_entity: Number entity on nibe_heatpump/MyUplink (register 43005/40940), sensor on generic Modbus. Estimated from the thermal model if not set.
data_description.power_sensor_entity: Enables accurate peak tracking (estimated from heat pump data if not provided)
data_description.nibe_temp_lux_entity: Enables intelligent DHW scheduling and thermal debt protection
data_description.additional_indoor_sensors: Extra room sensors for whole-house averaging. Median is recommended (robust to outliers).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EffektGuard
reconfigure.description: Change entity selections. Fields left empty are cleared (back to auto-discovery); the offset entity and heat pump model keep their previous values when left empty. The integration reloads automatically.

abort.nibe_not_found: No NIBE integration found. Install and configure MyUplink (cloud) or nibe_heatpump (local Modbus/NibeGW) first.

optimization_settings.name: Optimization Settings
optimization_settings.description: Choose optimization mode and temperature tolerance

data_description.optimization_mode:
Comfort: Minimal price optimization, prioritizes stable heating and comfort
Balanced: Moderate optimization with slight temperature variations
Savings: Maximum cost optimization with wider temperature swings
data_description.tolerance:
How much the indoor temperature can vary from target
(±0.2°C deadzone always maintained).

Lower = more stable
Higher = more aggressive cost optimization.

building_characteristics.name: Building Characteristics
building_characteristics.description: Physical properties affecting thermal behavior and prediction accuracy

data_description.thermal_mass:
How quickly your building heats and cools.

Lower (0.5-0.8) = lightweight construction.
Higher (1.5-2.0) = heavy materials like concrete.
data_description.insulation_quality:
Overall heat retention quality.
Higher = better insulation.

Modern (1.5-2.0),
Standard 1990s (0.8-1.2),
Older (0.5-0.8).

domestic_hot_water.name: Domestic Hot Water (DHW)
domestic_hot_water.description: Schedule when hot water should be ready and how much you need

data.dhw_min_amount: Minimum Hot Water at Scheduled Time

data_description.dhw_target_temp:
Target temperature for hot water storage tank (45-60°C).

Higher temperatures = more stored energy but more electricity consumption.
data_description.dhw_min_amount:
Minutes of hot water that should be available at the scheduled time.

EffektGuard will heat during the cheapest hours to ensure this amount is ready when you need it.
data_description.dhw_schedules: Select which heating periods to enable. Uncheck to disable heating during that period.
data_description.dhw_morning_hour:
Hour when hot water should be READY (e.g., 7 = ready at 07:00).

Heating starts during cheaper hours to ensure water is ready by this time.
data_description.dhw_evening_hour:
Hour when hot water should be READY (e.g., 18 = ready at 18:00).

Heating starts during cheaper hours to ensure water is ready by this time.

airflow_optimization.name: Airflow Optimization (Exhaust Air)
airflow_optimization.description: Configure airflow rates for exhaust air heat pumps. Enable/disable via the Airflow Optimization switch in Controls.

data_description.airflow_standard_rate:
Normal ventilation rate used during regular operation.
Set this to your preferred comfort level for daily use.

NIBE F750 default: 150 m³/h (speed 2).
data_description.airflow_enhanced_rate:
Boosted ventilation rate used during favorable conditions to extract more heat from exhaust air and improve COP.

NIBE F750 default: 252 m³/h (speed 4).

boost_heating.name: Boost Heating
boost_heating.description: Temporarily increase heating for quick comfort boost

boost_hot_water.name: Boost Hot Water
boost_hot_water.description: Start immediate hot water heating cycle
